title: Imitating Speech Patterns
prompt: Listen to a series of sentences where one person repeats another's words. Practice imitating this pattern by creating your own chain of sentences where each person repeats the previous person's words.
hint: Focus on the structure: 'I make [Person A]'s words my own, and you, [Person B], ...'. Try to keep the flow natural and continuous.
sample: I make Alice's words my own, and you, Bob, I make Alice's words my own, and you, Charlie, I make Bob's words my own.

ja.prompt: 一連の文を聞いて、一人が他の人の言葉を繰り返すパターンを練習しましょう。各人が前の人の言葉を繰り返す文の連鎖を作成してください。
ja.hint: 構造に注目してください：'I make [Person A]'s words my own, and you, [Person B], ...'。自然で連続的な流れを保つようにしましょう。
ja.sample: I make Alice's words my own, and you, Bob, I make Alice's words my own, and you, Charlie, I make Bob's words my own.

zh.prompt: 聆聽一系列句子，其中一個人重複另一個人的話。練習模仿這種模式，創建自己的句子鏈，每個人重複前一個人的話。
zh.hint: 注意結構：'I make [Person A]'s words my own, and you, [Person B], ...'。嘗試保持語句流暢自然。
zh.sample: I make Alice's words my own, and you, Bob, I make Alice's words my own, and you, Charlie, I make Bob's words my own.
